name: chain_65kyr_side_hustle_at_10_margin_is_go
method: $65K/yr side hustle at 10% margin, is going full-time actually worth it for scal

stages.task: Scan r/ecommerce, r/smallbusiness, r/Entrepreneur for posts mentioning $50K-150K revenue, low margins, scaling decisions, going full-time doubts
Score leads by: stated revenue range, margin pain severity, business type (physical product vs dropship vs service), recency. Filter to top 20%
Generate personalized cold DM/email using procedural memory cold email framework: mention their specific margin issue, offer 10-min audit, one clear CTA
Convert scaling economics data into 3 tweets + 1 thread on ecommerce margin math ($65K at 10% vs $200K at 30%)
